title: Mia Sable
summary: July 4, 2016 Award-winning singer-songwriter and actress of Choctaw descent Mia Sable has been studying acting, music, and dance since she was 4. You may have heard her music on TV shows like Toddlers & Tiaras on TLC, VH1’s Tough Love, and Dance Moms on Lifetime. Most recently, her track “It’s Easy”...
